The SISO benefit is available under Life Shield ROP variant, on opting monthly mode at inception. There will be a discount available (through-out the premium paying term) and this will be applicable on the premium amount arrived-at after HSAR.
Under Life Shield ROP variant, if SISO benefit is available then Online, Direct Sales, Web Aggregator and ISNP Discount will not be applicable for the policy.
The PPTs available for SISO Benefit are: PPT - 5, 6, 10, 12, 15, & 20,  RP, Pay till 60 years
Min PT for Life Shield ROP with monthly premium mode is 20.
